name: Meteogram Card
description: Scrollable weather meteogram using MET Norway Locationforecast API

latitude.description: Latitude for forecast (defaults to Home Assistant config)

longitude.description: Longitude for forecast (defaults to Home Assistant config)

days.description: Number of days of forecast to show

proxy_url.description: Optional: proxy endpoint URL that adds MET User-Agent header. If omitted, calls MET API directly (may fail due to CORS)
